judgment.summary: Uber generates strong free cash flow and high returns on equity but is currently struggling with significant earnings contraction and a recent massive miss.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.13 vs an estimate of 0.71 (miss), and the next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Free cash flow (TTM) $6.54B — strong cash generation.
Return on equity 35.3% — high capital efficiency.
Analyst growth est, current FY 34.9% — robust projected growth.
Forward P/E 17.25 vs trailing 18.57 — improving valuation profile.
negatives: Last reported EPS 0.13 vs estimate 0.71 — significant miss.
PEG ratio 4.51 — high valuation relative to growth.

news.paragraph: Uber is pursuing international expansion through increased investment in Delivery Hero and a consortium bid for a South Korean food delivery platform. While Loop Capital lowered its price target to $91, it maintained a buy rating, and recent Q1 results and new partnerships are being highlighted as potential catalysts. Traders should also weigh reputational risks following news of a legal trial involving a driver in Boston.
